verses.en: What is the (Day) of Noise and Clamour
And what will explain to thee what the (Day) of Noise and Clamour is

verses.bn: যেদিন মানুষ হবে বিক্ষিপ্ত পতংগের মত
verses.en: (It is) a Day whereon men will be like moths scattered about

verses.bn: এবং পর্বতমালা হবে ধুনিত রঙ্গীন পশমের মত।
verses.en: And the mountains will be like carded wool
Then, he whose balance (of good deeds) will be (found) heavy
Will be in a life of good pleasure and satisfaction
But he whose balance (of good deeds) will be (found) light
Will have his home in a (bottomless) Pit
And what will explain to thee what this is
